title: Minecraft Dungeons Stuff
description: This mod brings different stuff from Minecraft Dungeons to Minecraft.
body: This mod brings melee weapons from Minecraft dungeons to Minecraft. I've brought almost all the melee weapons. All the weapons retain their damage and attack speed. Now you can use axes, broadswords, spears, swords, pickaxes, and more in your battles! Some weapons set enemies on fire, while others poison them, making your battles much more exciting with this mod!
